title: NPV: The Majestic Mulch and Compost Company is considering a project...
summary: Calculate the NPV of a project by discounting expected cash flows at the appropriate discount rate.
prompt: The Majestic Mulch and Compost Company is considering a project that will cost $800,000 with projected cash flows of $200,000 annually for 5 years. What is the project’s NPV if the discount rate is 10%?
